overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic convertible driving at high speed through a sunlit cyberpunk city with palm trees and overpasses, transitioning through desert canyon landscapes, and into industrial zones with graffiti-covered concrete walls and pipelines.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban arterial road with palm trees

events.description: passing under a multi-level concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: accelerating through city streets in a futuristic convertible, weaving between lanes

notable_agents.action: dark SUV driving ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: tall futuristic office towers with reflective glass facades
rows of palm trees lining both sides of the wide avenue
multi-level highway overpasses and pedestrian bridges
multi-story parking garage with vibrant colored levels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-speed drive through a sunlit futuristic city. Modern glass towers rise on the left while a colorful parking structure stands on the right. Palm trees line the wide asphalt avenue as the car passes under concrete overpasses. Sparse traffic includes a dark SUV ahead on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from urban to desert wasteland

events.description: exiting the dense urban area into open desert landscape with rocky terrain
swerving to avoid debris and abandoned vehicles on the roadside

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed while transitioning from paved city roads to desert outskirts, avoiding obstacles

entered.detail: large reddish rock outcrops and boulders characteristic of desert terrain
tall construction cranes visible in the distance against the skyline

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts dramatically from urban to desert as the car leaves the city behind. Modern buildings give way to open desert scrub and rock formations. Industrial cranes appear on the left horizon while the road remains paved but increasingly littered with debris. The palm trees thin out as the landscape opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon with scattered industrial ruins

events.description: vehicle transitions from asphalt to dirt and sand terrain, kicking up dust

agents.ego_description: speeding across desert terrain, navigating around rock formations and scrub brush

entered.detail: large red rock canyon walls and geological formations
futuristic skyscrapers visible on the horizon indicating nearby urban center

segments.scene_description: The car now drives through open desert canyon terrain on dirt trails, kicking up dust clouds. Red rock formations flank both sides while distant city towers remain visible on the left horizon. The ground surface has changed from asphalt to packed dirt and sand, with sparse desert vegetation scattered about.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial service corridor with graffiti walls

events.description: entering narrow enclosed corridor between high concrete walls with chain link fencing
passing under a series of overhead pipe bridges and industrial walkways

agents.ego_description: navigating a narrow corridor between high walls, maintaining speed through the industrial alleyway

entered.detail: tall concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art
metal chain link fencing topped with barbed wire running along wall tops
overhead pipe bridges and industrial walkways spanning the corridor

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a narrow industrial corridor flanked by high concrete walls covered in vibrant graffiti. Chain link fences with barbed wire run along the top of the walls. The car speeds through this enclosed space, passing under overhead pipe bridges that cast shadows across the dirt path. The open desert gives way to this confined industrial alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway with storage tanks and pipelines

events.description: exiting the narrow corridor into open industrial zone with large storage tanks
approaching a large digital billboard structure marking an industrial checkpoint

agents.ego_description: accelerating on wide industrial road, approaching a large billboard structure with the number 2

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial storage tanks and silos
metal highway guardrails lining the right side of the road
massive industrial billboard displaying the number 2 and 'TECHNICA' text
large diameter metal pipes running parallel to the roadway

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens up into a wide industrial highway flanked by massive storage tanks on the left and pipelines on the right. The road surface returns to asphalt. The car approaches a large digital billboard structure displaying the number 2, marking what appears to be an industrial checkpoint or racing gate. Metal guardrails line the road as the vehicle maintains high speed through this open industrial zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed journey that transforms from a sunlit futuristic metropolis into a rugged desert canyon before concluding in a confined industrial zone. It begins on a wide asphalt avenue lined with palm trees and glass towers, passing under concrete overpasses as the city skyline recedes. As the urban environment fades, the scenery shifts into an open desert landscape where modern buildings are replaced by rock formations and industrial cranes, eventually transitioning from paved roads to dusty dirt trails flanked by red canyons. The open terrain then narrows into a confined industrial corridor with high graffiti-covered concrete walls and overhead pipe bridges that cast deep shadows. Finally, the alleyway expands back into a wide asphalt highway flanked by massive storage tanks and pipelines, leading the vehicle toward a large digital billboard marking an industrial checkpoint.
